_comment: FinMind TaiwanStockInfo.industry_category -> our sector exposure_id. ONLY clean, homogeneous categories are mapped. EXCLUDED on purpose: '電子工業' (legacy broad bucket — 265 stocks incl. 聯發科/瑞昱/日月光/中華電/鴻海 are mis-lumped here, too heterogeneous to map) and '電子零組件業' (mixes connectors/passives/PCB). The finer electronics sectors (被動元件, PCB/載板, 記憶體, 半導體設備, 重電, 自行車) have no clean FinMind category and stay curated. 半導體業 auto-fill is intentionally PARTIAL — semis tagged '電子工業' (e.g. 聯發科) are covered by curated/issuer_etf members instead. See pipelines/libs/shared/scripts/refresh_industry_members.py.
